title: SEALANT - MULTI-PURPOSE WHITE ACRYLIC SEALANT FLEXI 310ML CARTRIDGE
description: 151 Multi Purpose Acrylic Filler, for sealing & filling gaps around the home. A white acrylic filler, fits standard DIY cartridge caulking guns. Always ensure that the surface is smooth, clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying. Ready to use multi purpose filler. Colour: White.Store at room temperature
